mapper.select: SELECT A.LSN_NUM, A.CLA_NUM, A.LSN_SEQ, A.LSN_TITLE, B.LA_SAVE_NAME, C.CLA_TITLE FROM LESSON A LEFT JOIN LESSON_ATTACH B ON A.LSN_NUM = B.LSN_NUM AND B.LA_TYPE = 'VIDEO' JOIN CLASS C ON A.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE A.CLA_NUM = #{claNum} AND A.LSN_SEQ = #{lsnSeq}
SELECT LA_NUM, LSN_NUM, LA_NAME, LA_SAVE_NAME, LA_PATH, LA_TYPE FROM LESSON_ATTACH WHERE LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum} AND LA_TYPE = 'FILE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LESSON WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum}
